title: sesleria pumilio
intro: Sesleria pumilio, also known as Dwarf Blue Fescue, is a type of perennial grass native to the mountainous regions of Europe. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant is also believed to have health benefits, including reducing stress and anxiety, and acting as an antiseptic to aid in wound healing. Sesleria pumilio is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas and tinctures, to take advantage of its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
